title: Business Transaction v1
description: Single financial transaction for the operator business ledger. Instance-specific (grace-mar); not template-portable.

ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the row was appended

amount_usd.description: Positive number; type field determines income vs expense

category.description: Account category from chart-of-accounts (e.g. revenue, materials, shipping, platform_fees)

account.description: Optional sub-account or payment method (e.g. etsy_payments, paypal, bank_checking)

tax_category.description: Tax classification (e.g. cogs, business_expense, non_deductible, sales_tax_collected)

vendor_or_customer.description: Counterparty name (vendor for expenses, customer for income)

receipt_ref.description: Path or ID to receipt/invoice (e.g. etsy order number, file path)
